mapper.insert: INSERT INTO COURSE_ENROLLMENT ( USER_ID, COURSE_SN, ORD_SN, ACCS_STRT_DT, ACCS_END_DT, ENRL_STAT_CD ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{courseSn}, #{ordSn}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, ADD_MONTHS(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 12), 'ACTIVE' )
mapper.update: UPDATE COURSE_ENROLLMENT SET ACCS_END_DT = ADD_MONTHS(GREATEST(ACCS_END_DT, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), 12), ENRL_STAT_CD = 'ACTIVE', ORD_SN = #{ordSn}, MDFCN_DT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND COURSE_SN = #{courseSn}
